untranslatable_reason: Cup and Handle pattern requires visual/structural pattern recognition (cup rounding, handle formation, relative highs/lows tracking) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The signal describes a specific candlestick pattern topology that would require custom pattern detection logic, not available in the standard indicator set.
translation_notes: This classic technical pattern from Bulkowski requires identification of: (1) cup bottom structure with gentle rounding, (2) breakout above previous highs, (3) handle pullback with declining volume, and (4) volume surge at final breakout. These structural characteristics cannot be reliably translated into simple indicator comparisons. A proper implementation would require a dedicated cup-and-handle pattern detector or custom volatility/structure analysis beyond the provided indicators. The 22% target suggests a breakout continuation trade, but the entry specification is fundamentally pattern-based rather than indicator-based.
